title: sida pyenophylla
intro: Sida pyenophylla, also known as the prickly sida or spiny sida, is a plant species in the mallow family Malvaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, Sida pyenophylla has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Sida pyenophylla include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as serving as a natural remedy for wounds and digestive issues. Sida pyenophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for easy incorporation into a treatment plan under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
